LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CAROL SIONKOWSKI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; ALTHOUGH A CLAIM BASED ON THE MERE EXISTENCE OF A WALL WOULD STATE A PERMANENT NUISANCE, A CLAIM BASED ON THE PROCESS OF THE WALLS FAILING COULD BE A CONTINUING NUISANCE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN CSR# 10276 301/PJB
